---
title: "Home"
---

# Welcome to My Website

## Calista Hanlin Gozali

![My Photo](profile.jpeg){width=300px}

## About Me
## Career Aspiration

I aspire to build a career in data analytics and business intelligence, where I can use data to support decision-making and improve business performance.

## Skills

-   Data Analysis (R, Excel)
-   Data Visualization (Quarto, ggplot2)
-   Marketing Analytics
-   Problem Solving

## Education

-   Cal Poly Pomona
-   Major: Business Administration and Management

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## About This Website

This website showcases my learning in: - Quarto Dashboard - Shiny Apps - Shinylive
